title: corelib full Standard implementation
description:
compiler/corelib ships complete Core and package surfaces with stubs removed, tier tags honored in api.json, and corelib-quality CI plus pckg publish on main.

## Provenance
- **Catalog cutoff:** [`aaddd32`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/aaddd32) → [`ee88edf`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/ee88edf) on **beskid** (2026-05-26 – 2026-06-07)
- **Phase 3 tip (2026-06-08):** compiler working tree @ [`be6e171`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_compiler/commit/be6e171) — baseline **5/42** `just corelib` (Capabilities chain green; resolve import + Sgr codegen gaps remain)

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4 (Platform services, auth, and delivery tooling)
- **Status:** In progress — resolve/codegen waves largely landed; matrix **5/42** baseline with domain agents continuing; API completion + publish backlog
- **Workstreams:** `compiler-corelib`
- **Wave tasks:** Done: import codemod, spine gates, struct-seed, BSOL, pipeline, concurrency, CLI display, Capabilities/Terminal chain, harness engine reuse + CI `--all-targets`. In Progress: matrix green (42/42), Sgr/Format codegen. Backlog: collections storage, host FS, pckg publish
